methods.description: Process for surveying diverse habitats and collecting plant species data using aerial photography and transect walks.

steps.description: Identified dry slopes using aerial photography and accessed them by road and foot.
steps.searchable_summary: identify and access survey sites using aerial photography

steps.description: Conducted surveys by walking back and forth across delineated areas using parallel transects 2 m apart.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct transect surveys in delineated areas

steps.description: Identified species with the aid of Cody (1965, 2000) and Porsild and Cody (1980) and recorded them.
steps.searchable_summary: identify and record plant species using reference guides

steps.description: Made collections as necessary and deposited vouchers in the Canadian Museum of Nature.

methods.description: Criteria and sources used for listing Beringian taxa in the unglaciated region west of the Mackenzie Delta.

steps.description: Accepted Beringian species based on specific distribution criteria.
steps.searchable_summary: apply distribution criteria to identify Beringian species

steps.description: Examined maps and distributional information from Porsild and Cody (1980) and more recent works.
steps.searchable_summary: review maps and distribution data from literature
